name: Cloverleaf Rolls
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:20
Lightly grease muffin pans. Shape dough into 1-inch balls and place 3 balls in each muffin cup. Cover and let rise in a warm place (85 degrees), free from drafts, for 40 minutes or until doubled in bulk. Bake at 400 degrees for 10 to 12 minutes or until golden. Brush rolls with melted butter.
Yield: 2 dozen.
